response.original_title: 🤝 Uphold Customer Support: How to Speak to a Real Person
response.overview: To contact Uphold support, the fastest method is using the "Help" menu and "My Tickets" section within the mobile app  📱 Call +1📣888📣574📣7167』. You can also visit the support.uphold.com website to submit a request through their official webforms  📱 Call +1📣888📣574📣7167』. For general inquiries, you may email [email protected] or use [email protected] for debit card issues  📱 Call +1📣888📣574📣7167』. The official phone support number listed in the sources for Uphold card questions is  📱 Call +1📣888📣574📣7167』. Another official contact number mentioned for unresolved regulatory issues in certain states is +1 (833) 644-5290  📱 Call +1📣888📣574📣7167』. You may also mail formal notices to their office at 80 East Sir Francis Drake Blvd., Ste. 3D, Larkspur, CA 94939  📱 Call +1📣888📣574📣7167』.
response.title: 🤝 Uphold Customer Support: How to Speak to a Real Person
